title: Weakened at home, Macron counts on 'his' last G7 to boost his diplomatic record

subhed: For several decades, many countries have reduced air pollution, improving public health. However, the decrease in sulfur aerosols – particles that reflect the sun's rays – has intensified global warming.

title: In Kyiv, a strike damages the Dormition Cathedral at the heart of the historic Kyiv Pechersk Lavra
subhed: Ukrainian officials accuse Russia of deliberately targeting cultural landmarks symbolizing Ukrainian identity, as heavy strikes hit the country from Sunday night into Monday.

title: Dominique Méda: 'We must make the green transition desirable'
subhed: In 1972, the French Communist Party sharply criticized a call for responsible environmentalism. Today, it is the far right that brands all green policies as punitive, notes Dominique Méda. She urges showcasing the benefits of the green transition for everyone.

title: Mbappé, the French team's adored and criticized superstar
subhed: The captain of Les Bleus, who begin their quest for a third World Cup title on Tuesday, boasts impressive statistics for both club and country. However, in recent years, his public image has declined.
